get.description: List all backups or backups within a specific time range.
get.summary: List backups within a specified time range

parameters.description: Start time of the backup range in timestamp
parameters.name: startTime

parameters.description: End time of the backup range in timestamp
parameters.name: endTime

post.description: Create a backup, edit a stopped local server save, validate it, and atomically replace Level.sav
post.summary: Deliver an item through an offline save transaction

patch.description: Create a backup, verify the expected item and quantity, edit a stopped local server save, validate it, and atomically replace Level.sav
patch.summary: Update or remove one inventory slot through an offline save transaction

patch.description: Create a full backup, verify Level.sav and the target Players/*.sav, compare the complete map-progress digest, merge all bundled 1.0.0 fast-travel points, areas, and world-map flags while preserving unknown entries, validate, and atomically replace the player save
patch.summary: Unlock a player's complete 1.0.0 map and fast-travel progress through an offline save transaction

patch.description: Create a backup, locate one non-player record by instance ID, verify owner and expected nickname/level/EXP/HP/MaxHP, restore only the existing Hp or HP field to MaxHP, validate, and atomically replace Level.sav
patch.summary: Restore one Pal to full health through an offline save transaction

patch.description: Create a backup, locate one non-player record by instance ID, verify owner and expected nickname/level/EXP/HP/MaxHP, set cumulative Pal EXP and 1.0-derived HP, validate, and atomically replace Level.sav
patch.summary: Edit one Pal level through an offline save transaction

patch.description: Create a backup, locate one non-player record by instance ID, verify owner and expected nickname/level/EXP, update only NickName, validate, and atomically replace Level.sav
patch.summary: Rename one Pal through an offline save transaction

patch.description: Create a backup, verify the expected profile, update the character and guild records, set cumulative EXP from bundled game data when the level changes, validate, and atomically replace Level.sav
patch.summary: Edit a player nickname and level through an offline save transaction

patch.description: Create a backup, verify the current UInt16 value, update only unspent stat points in Level.sav, validate, and atomically replace it
patch.summary: Edit a player's unspent stat points through an offline save transaction

patch.description: Create a full backup, verify Level.sav and the target Players/*.sav, update only normal and ancient technology point balances, validate, and atomically replace the player save
patch.summary: Edit a player's technology point balances through an offline save transaction

post.description: Run an arbitrary command through Palworld's official RCON interface

get.description: Get the current world actor snapshot from the Palworld server

post.description: Ask the Palworld server to save the world immediately

get.description: Get the active Palworld dedicated server settings

post.description: Force stop the Palworld server without a graceful shutdown delay
